text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has been training harder than
ever in the run-up to the spring Tenno Sho,
adjusting her focus to account for the unique
demands of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now that she's a senior and making a name for
herself in the racing world, the demands on her
time are multiplying.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
So, to wrap things up, could you tell us what your
plans are for the future?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I mean to recommit myself to training, with the
goal of becoming the Emperor of all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope that you continue to cover every step of
my imperial campaign.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I promise to exceed all of your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You sound as confident as ever! I'll be rooting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Next is my TV interview, I believe... Hmmm. My
schedule's been packed a little too tight,
perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a rising star, Symboli Rudolf is constantly
swamped with interviews.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes it all in stride, saying that it's proof of
the stir she's causing in the racing world, but I'm a
bit more worried...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Shall we head to the track? This interview
presents a golden opportunity for the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Perfect for the announcement I have planned.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You can cock your head at me all you like,
but I'm not telling. You'll just have to wait and
see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And that concludes our tour of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We host guided visits periodically, so please
apply if you're interested.

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That's fascinating... but is there any other way to
get a feel for the academy aside from guided
tours?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed there is—and what's more, it will be held
in only a few days' time.

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text: How interesting! Can you tell us more?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's called the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every spring, Tracen Academy hosts a large event
complete with races and more. It's intended to
help our students interact with the fans who
support them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This year, we plan to expand its scope and create
our first "Mega" Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You don't say! How are you going to make it
bigger?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We plan to offer additional races, volunteer
presentations, live panels with academy
graduates...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And a wide variety of other new activities for
visitors to enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It will be accessible for both racing fans and
newcomers alike.

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That sounds marvelous! Do you have any plans to
take part in the event yourself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will spend most of the Fan Fest patrolling the
grounds in my capacity as student council
president...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But to close out the day, I will take part in the
main attraction: the exhibition race.
choice_data_list: (Huh?! She never told me about that!)

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly! So we'll get to see you race in person?
How incredibly exciting!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You hear that, everyone? Make sure to check out
Tracen Academy's Fan Fest!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're guaranteed to have a fan-fest-ic time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Be sure not to miss this opportunity to watch our
very own Umamusume compete live on the track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew. That's the last of them for today.
choice_data_list: What's this about the exhibition race?
What's this about the exhibition race?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've been planning it for a while, but I only
received the official approval a few days ago.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As the name implies, I hope to make it the Fan
Fest's main attraction.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Accordingly, I have scheduled it as the finale of
the event, and gathered all of the school's best
racers to take part.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Emperor's presence on the track will only
raise its profile further.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I can personally contribute to the Fan Fest's
success, then so much the better.
choice_data_list: You should have told me sooner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exhibition or not, a race is a race. I would have
appreciated the opportunity to adjust her
training regimen so that she could give her best
performance, and I tell her as much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the sentiment, but I've already
factored in our current schedule.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No adjustments will be required.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that will still place a heavy burden on her. As
her trainer, it's something I can't ignore.
choice_data_list: You need to rely on me more.
You need to rely on me more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your concern, Trainer. Truly, I do.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But by the same token, I ask the same from you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Please, have a little more faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No... Perhaps that's the wrong way of thinking
about it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I were truly worth believing in, I wouldn't have
to convince you at all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That, I believe, is what Air Groove was trying to
tell me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've got it all wrong, President. You don't...
understand at all...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I must be more selfless. Push myself harder. Make
greater sacrifices.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Who will follow the Emperor if she doesn't show
that she can lead?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My ideal is still a distant dream. I must seek out
more victories and greater prestige.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the way she's speaking, she should sound
grand, but instead she just looks... like she's
drowning.
choice_data_list: Have you spoken with Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not yet. Preparing for the Fan Fest has been
keeping her too busy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, she has already thrown down the
gauntlet, and I've found my answer to it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will put on such a convincing performance at the
exhibition race that none will be able to doubt
me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Failure is a luxury I can't afford on such a grand
stage.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A mediocre performance will undermine the
impact I've made on the racing world, and I
cannot allow that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every word lands like another weight on her back.
It almost hurts to watch...

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
There you are, President! There are a few things I
wanted to confirm with you about the Fan Fest...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. I'll be right there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My apologies, Trainer, but duty calls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She departs, leaving me wondering once more if
there's anything I can do to help her.
